name: looper
description: Write and clean beads, orchestrate GPT-5.6 work, and research software decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Write and clean beads, research decisions, run loops.
interface.longDescription: Looper writes compact GPT-5.6-aware Codex orchestration loops over plans, beads, bounded execution, review/fix passes, and proof. It includes Beadwriter for commit-sized execution packets, Bead Cleaner for safe bd backlog cleanup, and Phone-A-SWE for research-backed software decisions. System Mapper is deprecated for now, with its backlog retained under docs/postponed-work. Default code lanes require Matt Pocock Skills for matt-pocock-skills:implement and matt-pocock-skills:code-review.
defaultPrompt: Use Looper to write a Codex loop.
Use Beadwriter to decompose this bead.
Use Bead Cleaner to audit and safely prune open beads.
Turn this plan into implementation slices.
Write a loop using Matt Pocock skill lanes.
Use Phone-A-SWE to research this technical decision.
